title: Geogenanthus
taxonomy: Geogenanthus belongs to the plant family Amaryllidaceae. It is a genus of flowering plants native to the tropical regions of Africa. The genus Geogenanthus is part of the larger group of lilioid monocots. The classification of Geogenanthus is also supported by its physical characteristics, including its bulbous roots and strap-like leaves. Further study on the plant's morphology and phylogenetic analysis can provide more detailed insight into its classification.
